distinctive_elements: Considered one of the greatest video game soundtracks of all time
Praised as improvement over original Mega Man

notes: Documentation contains minimal specific musical data. Sources reference soundtrack quality but do not document tempo, keys, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics per stage/area. Heat Man's stage has an unused sound effect (explosion-like), suggesting fire-based audio design, but no musical parameters are documented for individual tracks or areas.
